visualInspection: Checked /tmp/aura_gsplat_main_mcmc_runs/truck_30000_cap2m/renders/val_step29999_0000.png; side-by-side validation render is nonblank and aligned. The render is smoother than the validation target but not corrupted or empty.
leaderboardImpact: Measured full-length CUDA Truck ablation with a 2M Gaussian cap. It is not promoted for the primary PSNR leaderboard objective because AURA Beta remains higher on Truck PSNR by 0.04717063903808594 dB. It is retained as a strong perceptual/SSIM tradeoff row because it beats AURA Beta, fixed-Gaussian control, official 2DGS, and official 3DGUT on Truck LPIPS, and slightly beats AURA Beta on Truck SSIM.
nextSteps: test one PSNR-oriented follow-up, such as cap2m with refinement through the final iteration or a longer 40k-50k schedule, because this row is within 0.05 dB of AURA Beta
do not promote gsplat-main MCMC as the primary AURA backend until same-split PSNR beats AURA Beta or a documented metric-policy change chooses perceptual quality over PSNR
if a follow-up beats AURA Beta on Truck PSNR, repeat on the remaining leaderboard scenes before making any multiscene SOTA claim
